commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

Fix: Auto-download quest data and use persistent storage

**Critical bug fix for Windows executable:**
- Changed data storage to use platform-specific user directories
  - Windows: AppData\Local\ProjectGorgonQuestHelper
  - Linux: ~/.local/share/projectgorgon-questhelper
- Added automatic download of quests.json and items.json on first run
- Downloads from official Project Gorgon CDN
- Validates downloaded files
- Creates data directory automatically

This fixes the "failed to load quests" error when running the executable
on a fresh installation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement 10 competitive UI features

1. My Tasks page (/my-tasks) — tabs (Active/Due Soon/Overdue/Done),
   priority filter pills, collapsible status groups, skeleton loading,
   empty states; added to router, sidebar, and AppLayout page titles.

2. Right-click context menu on Kanban cards — CardContextMenu via
   React.createPortal with auto-flip positioning; supports Move to
   status, Set priority, Assign/Unassign me, Duplicate, Archive, Delete.

3. List/Table view — ListView component with sortable columns (#,
   Title, Status, Priority, Assignees, Due Date, Labels); view toggle
   (Board/List) added to TaskFilterBar and KanbanPage.

4. Saved filter views — localStorage-persisted named filter presets
   in TaskFilterBar; Save button appears when filters are active;
   chips row for quick-loading saved views.

5. Markdown rendering in task descriptions — TaskDetailModal renders
   descriptions with react-markdown + remark-gfm; click-to-edit
   toggles back to MentionInput, saves on blur.

6. Team labels management (full-stack) — ILabel subdocument added to
   Team model; CRUD endpoints GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /teams/:id/labels
   in controller and routes; labelService client; TeamLabel type;
   Labels card in TeamPage settings tab with inline editing and
   color swatches.

7. Dashboard velocity sparkline — BarChart (recharts) showing tasks
   completed per day for the last 7 days, with total count badge.

8. Bulk actions improvements — priority dropdown and bulk archive
   button added to KanbanBoard selection toolbar; backend bulkUpdateTasks
   schema extended to accept isArchived field.

9. Comment and attachment counts on cards — commentCount and
   attachmentCount fields added to Task type; displayed in TaskCard
   footer and ListView; getTasks and getTask backend endpoints now
   aggregate real counts from Comment and Attachment collections.

10. Command palette (Cmd+K upgrade) — GlobalSearch supports dual mode:
    task search (default) and command mode (prefix with >); 12 commands
    for navigation and actions (new task, toggle theme, toggle sidebar)
    with keyword filtering and keyboard navigation.

Also: install react-markdown@10 + remark-gfm@4 for MD rendering.

commit.message:
Quiz: negative marking, revision rounds, detailed final score

Scoring:
- Correct answer: +1 mark
- Wrong answer: -0.33 mark (1/3 negative marking)
- Live score shown during quiz (turns red if negative)

Revision rounds:
- After every 20 questions, wrong answers are collected
- "Revision Round" screen shows count of wrong answers
- User goes through wrong questions again before next batch
- Revision bar shown in orange to distinguish from main round

Final result screen:
- Large final score (with decimals)
- Grid: Attempted / Correct / Wrong counts
- Accuracy % with progress bar
- Grade: Excellent / Good / Average / Needs Work
- Marking scheme reminder (+1 / -0.33)
- Full answer review with +1/-0.33 label per question

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve performance, security, and resilience

- Polling: exponential backoff on failures (2s → 15s cap) instead of fixed 2s
- Settings sync: use navigator.sendBeacon on page unload for reliable delivery
- Settings API: add POST handler for sendBeacon compatibility
- Upload: whitelist file extensions in addition to MIME type checks
- OG fetch: cap response body at 512KB to prevent memory abuse
- Security: add Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy header, referrerPolicy on links
- Accessibility: add aria-atomic and role="status" to toast container
- Error boundary: wrap ChatRoom to prevent full-app crashes
- Database: add index on messages(reply_to_id) for thread queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CalculateSessionAttendance job timeout and reliability

- Increase timeout from 120s to 300s (was causing TimeoutExceededException)
- Add ShouldBeUnique to prevent overlapping dispatches that cause duplicate
  UUID failures in failed_jobs table
- Increase tries from 3 to 5 and maxExceptions from 2 to 3 for resilience
- Optimize query: filter sessions by uncalculated attendance existence upfront
  instead of scanning all sessions then checking attendance per-session
- Use direct MeetingAttendance query instead of scoped relationship to avoid
  session_type mismatch between getMeetingType() and stored session_type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix night audit to include same-day checkout (hourly) bookings

Broadened the checked_out condition from check_out_date = audit_date
to check_in_date <= audit_date AND check_out_date >= audit_date.
This captures both hourly (same-day) and multi-night checkouts.
Also added 'voided' to DB function exclusion list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

remote chat: run inference on cluster GPU via srun with token streaming

Add remote chat inference so users can chat with models trained on
Slurm clusters directly from the UI. Inference runs on a compute node
via srun (not the login node) with configurable partition, GPU type,
memory, and time limit.

- New remote_chat_runner.py: SSH into cluster, sync forge bundle with
  hash-based caching, upload runner script with stdout chunk buffering,
  execute via srun with GPU allocation
- SshSession.stream_command(): new method for streaming command output
  with proper drain after exit (fixes race where recv_ready misses
  trailing data) and CPU-spin prevention
- CLI: forge remote chat --cluster --model-path --prompt plus resource
  flags (--partition, --gpu-type, --memory, --time-limit)
- ChatPage: detect remote models, resolve cluster name, show resource
  config fields (partition/GPU type from cluster, memory, time limit),
  hide local-only fields (dataset, tokenizer, weights, position embedding)
- Setup output (env provisioning) redirected to stderr to keep stdout
  clean as the token data channel

fix(search): restore model-to-title roll-up and cache titles endpoint

Search was only matching title names, missing model-level matches like
"Blood Sucker Edition" that should roll up to their parent title. This
was lost when SearchResults was extracted in bac3a24. Also add server-side
caching to /api/titles/all/ (matching the pattern used by models,
manufacturers, and people) and wire Title saves into cache invalidation.

commit.message:
feat: rewrite training to use environment_factory (no vLLM)

Drop vLLM and rollout_func entirely. Use TRL's environment_factory
which exposes load_skill/unload_skill/submit as native tool calls.
TRL handles all multi-turn token accounting and tool masking.

Requires: transformers>=5.2.0 (no vLLM constraint)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

release: v2026.3.8.2 — kiosk face, gamepad, captions, brain visibility, fixes

## What's in this release

### New features
- Animated SVG robot face (/face) — 3 styles, speaking mouth, closed captions overlay
- Full-screen touch gamepad (/gamepad) — press-hold D-pad, Bluetooth gamepad support
- Brain model visibility — /api/status exposes brain_primary/secondary/active_model;
  /api/command returns model_used; gateway logs "Brain replied via X in N ms"
- Wake-up greeting on boot (non-blocking TTS after channels start)
- Dashboard: 🧠 Brain section, active-only channel pills, model caption in chat,
  Terminal Access section, Setup Wizard link, Closed Captions toggle in settings
- Speaker.is_speaking / current_caption tracking (set per TTS sentence, cleared in finally)
- SafetyLayer._last_write_denial — descriptive reason per safety rejection
- GET /api/fs/estop — {estopped, proc_status, last_denial}

### Fixes
- proc snapshot uses nested keys (proc.hw.camera, proc.loop.iteration, etc.)
  but dashboard read flat keys — all 5 broken paths corrected; camera/speaker/
  loops/latency/last_thought now display correctly
- Ruff lint: F811 duplicate HTMLResponse import, E702 semicolons, I001 imports
- test_dashboard_mission_control: restored "Mission Control" comment + mc_launch/mc_stop keys
- Gamepad title: double-brace {{_robot}} fixed to single-brace substitution
- Dashboard _gp_url NameError in voice section

### Version
- pyproject.toml + castor/__init__.py: 2026.3.8.2
- All CI checks pass: ruff lint, ruff format, RCAN validation, setup docs sync
- 6,404 tests passing

- minimum_lens_system.ipynb: Step 2 adds sep≥20mm + z≤140mm + Δf=5mm,
  Step 3 adds |f|∈[30,1000]mm on top

commit.message:
Claude/refactor stateless agents kfkac (#55)

* refactor: stateless agent execution via immediate compression and sliding window

Replace the O(n) per-step compression scan in all 4 agent tool-loops
(implementer, debugger, security, archivist) with two mechanisms:

1. Immediate compression at insertion time — tool results are compressed
   via compress_tool_result() before entering the message history, and
   write_file arguments are compressed inline via compress_write_file_args().

2. Sliding-window pruning — when messages exceed a threshold (16 for
   30-step agents, 12-14 for shorter ones), old messages are dropped and
   replaced with a structured checkpoint summary (no extra LLM call).

Also compacts previous_fixes in the debug retry loop to store only
essential fields (~500 chars) instead of full debug results.

Shared compression logic is extracted into context_compressor.py,
eliminating ~120 lines of duplicated code across the 4 agents.

Expected impact: ~60-78% reduction in prompt tokens for long agent
loops, O(1) compression cost per step, stable prompt sizes in debug
retry loops.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01WuS5ndU73aJt2Gwh5yw5iC

* fix: prevent sliding window from breaking tool_use/tool_result pairing

The prune_message_history() tail selection could start at a "tool" role
message whose corresponding "assistant" message (with tool_calls) had
been pruned.  This violates the Anthropic API requirement that every
tool_result has a matching tool_use in the previous message, causing
400 Bad Request errors at step 17+ of agent loops.

Fix: walk the tail start index backwards past any "tool" messages to
include the preceding "assistant" message, preserving the pairing.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01WuS5ndU73aJt2Gwh5yw5iC

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Resolve game display names server-side and use in daemon logs

SourceHub now populates GameInfo.gameName from the plugin manifest in R2
before forwarding state to UserHub, eliminating the client-side race where
the web UI would show raw game IDs (e.g. "d2r") if the manifest fetch
hadn't completed before the WebSocket state arrived.

Daemon INFO-level logs now include the human-readable game name alongside
the machine-readable game_id for all user-facing log messages.

commit.message:
Add Custom Instrument Samples feature (Premium only)

Premium users can upload one audio file per instrument containing all
37 chromatic notes C2→C5 played in order. The app automatically:
- Decodes the MP3/WAV/OGG/M4A via Web Audio API decodeAudioData()
- Slices it into 37 individual AudioBuffers using fixed note duration
- Stores each slice in SampleCache with exact base frequency
- Persists the raw file in IndexedDB — no re-upload on next visit
- Auto-restores custom samples from IDB on every page load
- Falls back to CDN samples for any instrument without a custom file
- "✕ Clear" button per instrument reverts to CDN samples

UI: "🎼 Samples" button in toolbar, visible only to Premium/Admin users.
Modal shows all 5 instruments with file picker, sec/note input, status
badge (✅ Custom / 🌐 CDN), and clear button.

Technical notes:
- CHROMATIC_C2_C5: 37-note array used for slicing and cache keys
- SAMPLE_ORIG_NOTES: backs up CDN note lists for clean revert
- _pendingCustomSamples: queues IDB records loaded before audioCtx
  exists; applied in initAudio() on first user play interaction
- updateSamplesButton() called from onAuthStateChanged after isPremium set

commit.message:
fix(analysis): relax Silence→Stuck gradient and harden frontend resilience (v2.14)

Port 6 applicable fixes from macOS audit reports to Windows:
- Relax F6/F3 silence penalty gradient (lib.rs: /25→/45, /30→/50;
  features.rs: /50→/60, /80→/100) for 5-8s Nudge→Wall gap (was ~1s)
- 3-stage EWMA α (0.15/0.18/0.25 at 0s/15s/25s) for gradual Nudge traversal
- Unify overlay polling guard (session-started event sync)
- IPC failure safe fallback (reset to Flow, clear Lv2 timer)
- Log dropped InputEvents via tracing::warn! (hook.rs)
- 1 fix judged non-applicable: IME_OPEN Acquire ordering (macOS-specific)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add R1 ratio mode (--r1_min_same_side_ratio)

50-case regression with negation_exempt+skip_midline only reduced R1
from 100→90. Remaining violations are all-or-nothing false positives
from router mis-routing a minority of tokens to the wrong side.

Change R1 block from all-or-nothing to same_side_ratio threshold:
- Classify cited tokens into same/opp/cross (cross excluded from ratio)
- Fire R1 only when same_side_ratio < r1_min_same_side_ratio (default 1.0)
- Add --r1_min_same_side_ratio flag (0.6 recommended) to run_mini_experiment.py
- Record ratio in run_meta.json and violation message

Update CHANGELOG_RECENT_CN.md and RUN_GUIDE_CN.md with 0.6 threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
